description: A senior engineer departed Acme Corp under suspicious circumstances, taking a USB backup drive. Acme suspects the engineer exfiltrated the source code for their flagship product—a high-performance in-memory database written in C. Create a forensic case named 'IP_Theft_2024' with case number 'INV-IP-008' in /home/ga/Cases/ and analyze the disk image /home/ga/evidence/ip_theft.dd. Locate the exfiltrated 'AcmeDB_Core' project directory within 'Personal/Projects/Archived' and identify all '.c' and '.h' files belonging to it, ensuring decoy files from other locations are excluded. Export a pipe-delimited manifest to /home/ga/Reports/source_code_manifest.csv with the header FILENAME|FULL_PATH|SIZE_BYTES|MD5_HASH. Additionally, write a summary to /home/ga/Reports/ip_theft_summary.txt containing the lines 'PROJECT_FOLDER_PATH: <full_path_in_image>', 'TOTAL_SOURCE_FILES: <N>', and 'TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES: <N>'.
